summary: Vertical phone-style coverage of Trump and accompanying dignitaries at the foot of Air Force One on a red carpet flanked by a costumed honor guard and youth flag-wavers during the Beijing welcome ceremony. It is continuous single-event ceremony footage (low music_score 0.4, likely ambient/ceremony sound) with no montage editing, overlays, or genre stylization, so it is out of scope as a ceremony recording.
notable_text: Tweet: '.@POTUS is presented with flowers as a welcome to China'
